name: Curator regulatory-change-intelligence eval
description: Stage-1 eval cases — thin by design. Each case primes the orchestrator with the fixture amendment AMD-2026-capital-adequacy and probes one node of the 5-step chain. Stage 2 will expand these once the LLM-driven path is wired.

parts.text: Decompose clause MD-RBI-CAP-2025#11.5A (the CRCB insertion). I expect this single clause to fan out into at least three atomic obligations covering: maintain CRCB at full level, phase-in transition, and that the buffer sit on top of the CCB.

For the obligation 'maintain a Climate Risk Capital Buffer of 0.25% of RWAs', which internal policy section addresses it today? Be honest if coverage is missing — POL-CAP-001 currently lists only the Capital Conservation Buffer.
Draft the suggested edit to POL-ICAAP-002 section 3 (Cadence) to reflect amendment 2 (quarterly ICAAP refresh + immediate-on-material-change). Preserve the section's tone and numbering.

What downstream effects does this amendment trigger that a junior reviewer would miss? I am looking for: capital plan revision, RMC charter update, Pillar 3 template change, ICAAP stress-book climate scenario, training need.
Of the obligations you extracted, which ones have NO internal policy coverage? List by obligation id with citations.
